differentials.name: Unipolar head =  1 articulation between metal implant head + native acetabular cartilage
differentials.raw: Unipolar head =  1 articulation between metal implant head + native acetabular cartilage

differentials.name: Bipolar head =  2 articulations to improve range of motion:
differentials.raw: Bipolar head =  2 articulations to improve range of motion:

differentials.name: Total prosthesis
differentials.raw: Total prosthesis (mostly for treatment of arthritis)

differentials.name: Resurfacing = replacing articulating surfaces of hip joint and removing very little bone
differentials.raw: Resurfacing = replacing articulating surfaces of hip joint and removing very little bone

context: √  preservation of acetabular cartilage + subchondral bone plate √  only femoral stem is fixed by (a)  bone cement (polymethylmethacrylate) (b)  press-fit / in-growth with textured surface facilitating in-growth of trabecular bone (a)  between inner head + liner of bipolar head (b)  between bipolar head (shell) + acetabulum √  smooth outer surface √  slightly greater than hemispheric shape √  no screw holes √  acetabulum reamed √  screw holes in acetabular cup √  small acetabular cup in pelvic socket √  femoral head component seated with a pegged stem inside a preserved femoral neck
